memberdef.name: MAX_TOKEN_LEN
memberdef.initializer: 128 /* Maximum length of a single token string */

memberdef.name: MERGE_HASH_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 65536 /* Size of merge lookup hash table */

memberdef.argsstring: (CKTrueBPE *bpe, int32_t left_id, int32_t right_id, int32_t merged_id, int32_t priority)
memberdef.name: ck_true_bpe_add_merge

memberdef.argsstring: (CKTrueBPE *bpe, const char *left, const char *right, int32_t priority)
memberdef.name: ck_true_bpe_add_merge_by_tokens

memberdef.argsstring: (CKTrueBPE *bpe, const char *token, int32_t id, float score)
memberdef.name: ck_true_bpe_add_token

memberdef.argsstring: (const CKTrueBPE *bpe, const int32_t *ids, int num_ids, char *text, int max_len)
memberdef.name: ck_true_bpe_decode

memberdef.argsstring: (CKTrueBPE *bpe, const char *text, int text_len, int32_t *ids, int max_ids)
memberdef.name: ck_true_bpe_encode

memberdef.argsstring: (CKTrueBPE *bpe, int vocab_size, const int32_t *offsets, const char *strings, int num_merges, const int32_t *merges)
memberdef.name: ck_true_bpe_load_binary

memberdef.name: ck_true_bpe_set_special_ids

memberdef.name: encode_chunk

memberdef.name: find_best_merge

memberdef.name: gpt2_pretokenize

memberdef.name: preprocess_text

memberdef.name: token_list_append
